skill.name: executing-plans
skill.description: Guides AI assistants through written implementation plans with batch execution, verification steps, and human review checkpoints.
skill.summary: Execute written implementation plans in controlled batches with review checkpoints.
skill.author: ZhanlinCui

security_audit.summary: Static analysis reported a high-severity weak cryptographic algorithm at SKILL.md:3. Manual review found this is a false positive: the cited line is metadata text and the skill contains no code, scripts, network access, filesystem operations, or cryptography. No prompt injection or malicious intent was found.

low_findings.title: Static Finding Dismissed: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm
low_findings.description: The analyzer flagged SKILL.md line 3, but that line is a plain English description. No cryptographic algorithm, code, or security-sensitive operation appears in the skill.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The cited line is frontmatter text describing plan execution, not code. The skill contains only procedural guidance and no cryptographic implementation.

content.value_statement: Long implementation plans can drift without clear checkpoints. This skill guides Claude, Codex, and Claude Code through batched execution, verification, and review handoffs.
actual_capabilities: Reads a written plan before execution and reviews it for concerns.
Breaks work into small batches, starting with the first three tasks by default.
Tracks task state as in progress or completed during implementation.
Runs requested verification steps before reporting progress.
Pauses for feedback between batches and after blockers.
Directs final branch completion through a named follow-up skill when available.
limitations: Does not include scripts, commands, or automation files.
Depends on a separate written plan supplied by the user.
Requires human feedback when a plan has gaps or repeated failures.
References a separate finishing skill that may not be installed.

use_cases.title: Implement Approved Plans
use_cases.description: Execute a prepared engineering plan in small batches with verification after each task.

use_cases.title: Coordinate Review Checkpoints
use_cases.description: Keep implementation work aligned with reviewer feedback before the next batch begins.

use_cases.title: Standardize Agent Workflows
use_cases.description: Give AI assistants a repeatable process for plan review, execution, reporting, and stopping conditions.

prompt_templates.title: Run This Plan
prompt_templates.prompt: Use executing-plans to read the plan at [plan file], review it for concerns, and start the first batch if it is ready.

prompt_templates.title: Review Before Implementation
prompt_templates.prompt: Use executing-plans to inspect [plan file]. Report any concerns before editing files, then wait for my approval.

prompt_templates.title: Execute With Verification Gates
prompt_templates.prompt: Use executing-plans for [plan file]. Complete three tasks per batch, run each listed verification, and report results before continuing.

prompt_templates.title: Recover From a Blocked Batch
prompt_templates.prompt: Use executing-plans to resume [plan file] from task [number]. If verification fails again, stop and explain the blocker.

output_examples.input: Execute the migration plan and stop after the first batch.
output_examples.output: The assistant reviews the plan, completes the first three tasks, runs the listed checks, and reports that it is ready for feedback.

output_examples.input: Review this implementation plan before making changes.
output_examples.output: The assistant identifies unclear steps, asks targeted questions, and waits before starting implementation.

output_examples.input: Continue after reviewer feedback on the previous batch.
output_examples.output: The assistant applies requested changes, starts the next batch, verifies the work, and reports progress.

best_practices: Provide a clear plan file with small, ordered tasks.
Include explicit verification commands or acceptance checks.
Review each batch report before authorizing more work.
anti_patterns: Do not use it for vague goals without a written plan.
Do not skip verification steps to finish faster.
Do not continue through blockers without human clarification.

faq.question: What does this skill do?
faq.answer: It guides an AI assistant through a written implementation plan in batches with verification and review checkpoints.

faq.question: Does it generate the plan?
faq.answer: No. It expects a written plan to exist before execution begins.

faq.question: How many tasks are completed per batch?
faq.answer: The default first batch is three tasks, unless the user or plan says otherwise.

faq.question: What happens when a task is unclear?
faq.answer: The skill instructs the assistant to stop and ask for clarification instead of guessing.

faq.question: Does it run code automatically?
faq.answer: No. The skill contains Markdown instructions only and no executable automation.

faq.question: Which tools can use it?
faq.answer: The report lists Claude, Codex, and Claude Code as supported tools.
